Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

This should be merged back into patch https://review.whamcloud.com/54416 "LU-10499 pcc: reset file mmaping for the file once mmaped" instead of landing that patch with a known bug.

You can add the commit message to that one, and add:

 Was-Change-Id: I4e7dad93c589ac8062fe6c08423bf209f08432b6

for tracking purposes.

+1 because this is a fix, but merging to the earlier patch would be better.

parents.subject: LU-10499 pcc: add test for concurrent read from 2 clients

commit.subject: LU-10499 pcc: set invalid cache state for fallback I/O
commit.message:
LU-10499 pcc: set invalid cache state for fallback I/O

When fallback I/O to Lustre (not PCC backend), it should set the
cache state correctly (with *cached = false).

EX-bug-id: EX-3636
Signed-off-by: Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I4e7dad93c589ac8062fe6c08423bf209f08432b6
